filesystem.c(3) Library Functions Manual filesystem.c(3)

NAME

filesystem.c - File operation stubs for WASM.

SYNOPSIS

Functions

ssize_t platform_read (int fd, void *buf, size_t count)

int platform_close (int fd)
int platform_access (const char *pathname, int mode)
char * platform_get_data_dir (void)

Detailed Description

File operation stubs for WASM.

FILE
  * platform_fopen (const char * name, const char * filename, const char *
  mode)


Definition at line 20 of file
    wasm/stubs/filesystem.c.


20                                                                                {
21   if (!name) {
22     return NULL;
23   }
24   FILE *stream = fopen(filename, mode); // Use standard fopen
25   if (stream) {
26     int fd = fileno(stream);
27     if (fd >= 0) {
28       NAMED_REGISTER_FD(fd, name);
29     }
30   }
31   return stream;
32 }

int
  platform_open (const char * name, const char * pathname, int flags,
  ...)


Definition at line 82 of file
    wasm/stubs/filesystem.c.


82                                                                           {
83   if (!name) {
84     return -1;
85   }
86 
87   // Handle optional mode parameter for O_CREAT
88   int fd = -1;
89   int mode = 0;
90   if (flags & 0x0200) { // O_CREAT flag value
91     va_list args;
92     va_start(args, flags);
93     mode = va_arg(args, int);
94     va_end(args);
95     fd = open(pathname, flags, mode);
96   } else {
97     fd = open(pathname, flags);
98   }
99 
100   if (fd >= 0) {
101     NAMED_REGISTER_FD(fd, name);
102     log_dev("Opened file descriptor %d for %s at path %s", fd, name, pathname);
103   }
104 
105   return fd;
106 }






References args.

    check_known_host(), check_known_host_no_identity(),
    log_init(), main(), parse_gpg_keys_from_response(),
    remove_known_host(), and test_logging_disable().

ssize_t
  platform_write (int fd, const void * buf, size_t count)


Definition at line 67 of file
    wasm/stubs/filesystem.c.


67                                                               {
68   // For WASM, route stdout/stderr to browser console
69   if ((fd == 1 || fd == 2) && buf && count > 0) {
70     wasm_log_to_console(fd, (const uint8_t *)buf, count);
71     return (ssize_t)count; // Report all bytes as written
72   }
73 
74   // Fallback: use standard write for other fds
75   return write(fd, buf, count);
76 }






References wasm_log_to_console().


Referenced by log_json_write(), and
    platform_write_all().
